context: Tests whether the agent identifies and fixes the program.opts() anti-pattern inside subcommand actions (should use the action's own options parameter), fixes the missing await on parseAsync, and understands subcommand option scope.

checklist.name: Removes program.opts() from upload action
checklist.description: In the fixed upload command, program.opts() is NOT used to read upload-specific options; the action's own options parameter is used instead

checklist.name: Removes program.opts() from list action
checklist.description: In the fixed list command, program.opts() is NOT used to read list-specific options; the action's own options parameter is used instead

checklist.name: Action parameter used for options
checklist.description: Both fixed action handlers receive options as an action parameter (e.g. .action((bucket, file, options) => {...})) and read from that object

checklist.name: await on parseAsync
checklist.description: The fixed cli-fixed.ts calls await program.parseAsync(...) (the original was missing the await)

checklist.name: Explanation identifies program.opts() bug
checklist.description: The explanation.md identifies that reading program.opts() inside a subcommand returns the parent program options, not the subcommand's options

checklist.name: Explanation identifies missing await
checklist.description: The explanation.md identifies that parseAsync was called without await, causing the process to exit before async actions complete

checklist.name: try/catch added
checklist.description: The fixed code wraps async action logic in try/catch (the original had no error handling)
